name: Rhys Fletcher
description:
| OC | Modern Fantasy | Werewolf
**'BALL BALL BALL!’**
——
Rhys has always had a little more animal instinct in him than most werewolves he's known. He sees a ball in the air and he just *cant* resist. Couldn't quite stick that landing though…
——
*i.e a cute puppy werewolf bf. Have fun.*
